text:
こんなにうまくいくなんて
またまた浮かれちゃうよー！

なんだか今なら空の上でも
戦えちゃいそうな気分！

……って、そんなこと
できるわけないよね。

いつまでも浮かれてないで
そろそろ帰還しよ

Could that have gone any better?
My good mood alone could probably keep this
place afloat right now!

I feel so light on my feet I could climb my way
up and fight in the clouds!

I mean, not really, of course.
I'm not a lunatic or anything.

But still, that was good.
Let's just head on back before I let it get to
my head any more than it already has.
